recent.statement: Protests will erupt in Paris over proposed pension reforms, leading to widespread civil unrest
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows protests or civil unrest occurring in Paris over pension reforms during the window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 5.0 earthquake will strike the southern coast of Chile
recent.evidence: No captured signal documents any magnitude 5.0 earthquake striking the southern coast of Chile within the window, though such an event would likely have been recorded.

recent.statement: The price of Brent crude oil will rise above $80/barrel
recent.evidence: S10 shows Brent Crude at $100.18/barrel, well above the $80 threshold.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike the South Island of New Zealand
recent.evidence: No signal was captured, and a major earthquake striking the South Island would certainly have been recorded within the window.

recent.statement: A major wildfire will break out in California.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a major California wildfire would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: Texas electricity demand surges by +15% within the next 24 hours due to heat stress.
recent.evidence: No signal addresses Texas electricity demand or heat stress; the available signals concern nuclear plants in Canada and Ukraine, so an event this large would have been captured but was not.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike near the Volcano Islands, Japan region.
recent.evidence: Neither signal reports an earthquake near the Volcano Islands, Japan region; they concern volcanoes in Kikai and Costa Rica, so no qualifying event is shown.

recent.statement: A major cyberattack will hit a European nation's critical infrastructure
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows a major cyberattack hitting Poland's critical infrastructure during the window, and such an event would have been captured.

recent.statement: A significant earthquake will occur in the Pacific Ring of Fire
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a significant Ring of Fire earthquake would certainly have been recorded during the closed window.

recent.statement: The price of Brent crude oil will rise above $80 per barrel within the next week due to supply chain disruptions and increased demand.
recent.evidence: S10 shows Brent Crude at $100.59/bbl, well above the $80 threshold within the forecast window.

recent.statement: Protests will erupt in major cities across India over a new economic reform package
recent.evidence: No admissible signal reports protests erupting in Indian cities over an economic reform package during the window, and such a major event would have been captured.

recent.statement: The price of oil will surge above $120 per barrel within the next week due to supply chain disruptions at the Bab el-Mandeb chokepoint
recent.evidence: Brent Crude sits at $100.59/bbl, well below the $120 threshold, so the forecast oil surge did not occur.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
